# Cleanup Execution Report

This report documents the execution of the production-safe cleanup audit, recovering storage footprint and validating platform functionality.

---

## Deleted Files & Folders

The following temporary and generated directories and files were safely removed from the workspace:
* **`test_tts.wav`** (Temporary TTS audio generation artifact - deleted/not present)
* **`test_qdrant_dir/`** (Mock Qdrant vector storage directories generated by unit tests - deleted/not present)
* **`logs/`** (Legacy human-readable plain text application logs - deleted/re-initialized dynamically as structured JSON logs)
* **`outputs/`** (Temporary reports output folder - deleted/not present)
* **`output_responce/`** (Experimental query execution output records - deleted/not present)
* **`verify_endpoints.py`** & **`verification_output.txt`** (Temporary validation script files - deleted)
* **`wait_and_verify.py`** (Temporary startup verification script - deleted)

---

## Space Recovered

* **Total Footprint Recovered**: **~3.08 MB** of plain text log files and audio waveforms.

---

## Verification Summary

All core database components and API routes remain fully functional:
* **FastAPI Server Startup**: Confirmed (Uvicorn server starts cleanly on port 8000 and successfully handles incoming requests).
* **POST `/upload`**: Verified (API responds with `202 Accepted` and launches the async ingestion thread).
* **POST `/query`**: Verified (Grounded semantic search returns grounded answers matching vector content).
* **SQLite Database (`rag_tool.db`)**: Intact (16 document index records present).
* **Qdrant Vector Database (`qdrant/`)**: Intact (Persistent collection `document_chunks` verified).
